text:
VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The real paper is titled "NormTab: Improving Symbolic Reasoning in LLMs Through Tabular Data Normalization" by Md Mahadi Hasan Nahid and Davood Rafiei, published in Findings of EMNLP 2024 (not 2022), at URL aclanthology.org/2024.findings-emnlp.203. The cited reference has a truncated/altered title (missing "Normalization"), entirely wrong authors (Narayan, Tang, Nie, Zhang, Xu, Lu, Chowdhery, Cohen, Petrov, Riedel), the wrong year (2022 vs. 2024), and the cited URL (2022.findings-emnlp.203) points to a completely different paper about incremental parse states.
LINK: https://aclanthology.org/2024.findings-emnlp.203/
